content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: File

Date: December 15, 1978

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION  
Ted Prim

Subject: Question from Chip Nielson

At the Opinion Request Meeting of November 6, 1978, the staff concluded that an official who had a contract to return to a position of employment with a business entity at a future date would be viewed as a current employee of the entity for purposes of disqualification pursuant to Section 87103(d). 87200 filers would not be required to disclose the existence of a future employment contract, but persons covered by Conflict of Interest Codes which require disclosure of any business entities in which the official is an employee would be required to disclose such information.

Retention of certain perks might trigger disqualification or reporting but these decisions would have to be made on a case-by-case basis.

TP:nrw
